info.name: Billing Software Authentication API
info.description: Complete authentication API collection for frontend integration testing

request.description: Refresh access token using refresh token
Verify email address using verification token
Get current client's profile (requires client role)
Get specific client by ID (requires admin/staff role)
Get client by numeric client ID (requires admin/staff role)
Create a new cPanel account (Admin only)

body.raw:
